headline: CAVA Group's Tech Stack Could Be the Next Growth Lever
summary: CAVA's CavaCore, Current and Digital Kitchens aim to fuel unit growth to 750 stores - while delivery mix and salmon rollout pressure costs.

headline: Is CAVA Stock a Buy at 5x Sales? Upside vs. Risks
summary: CAVA at 5.15x sales trades above peers, backed by a beat-and-raise FY26 outlook and $75 target. Yet salmon rollout and energy costs threaten margins.

headline: CAVA Stock Outlook on Traffic, Digital and Unit Growth
summary: CAVA raises FY26 outlook as traffic-led same-store sales jump 9.7%, digital mix nears 40% and new-store openings stay on pace.

raw.headline: CAVA Stock Outlook on Traffic, Digital and Unit Growth

headline: Wall Street Lunch: Quantinuum Soars 12% On Nasdaq Debut Following $1.7B IPO
summary:
Quantinuum (QNT) debuted on the Nasdaq at $68 a share, up 12% from its IPO price.
The quantum computing company, which is majority owned by Honeywell (HON), sold 28M shares at $60 each.

headline: Chipotle nods to NBA milestones to dole out 53K free entrees
summary: The chain will post a text-to-win code on X as part of an effort inspired by separate achievements from the New York Knicks and San Antonio Spurs.
